Verified against setup_task.sh lines 29-39 and export_result.sh line 99. The metadata is missing 'distro' (from line 36: '600A Distro Box'). All keywords exist in source material. Verifier scripts perform case-insensitive matching (lowercase conversion at export_result.sh line 89).

Verified as reasonable minimum for lighting plot diagram containing: room boundary (1), door (1), window (1), table (1), detective shape (1), suspect shape (1), legend section (1+), 5 lighting fixtures (5), power cable edges. Total minimum ~12-15 shapes expected.

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a synthetic film lighting plot diagram for 'Scene 54: The Interrogation' in draw.io (version 26.0.9, released Jan 2025). The diagram must depict a 20' x 15' interrogation room with specific placement of real professional lighting equipment: Arri Skypanel S60 (L1), Fresnel light (L2), ETC Source 4 Leko 19° (L3), bounce board fill (L4), and desk lamp (L5). The metadata keywords list is incomplete—it omits 'Distro' (from the Distro Box requirement), and uses inconsistent capitalization relative to the case-insensitive verifier matching. All equipment names and lighting terminology are authentic.
